Unresolvable dependencies are diagnosed even when nothing consumes the provider.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type DB struct{}

type Unused struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewUnused(db *DB) *Unused { return &Unused{} }

//fabrik:http GET /
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:10:16: no provider for *web.DB
  help: add a //fabrik:provider returning *web.DB
